channel.title: JPM — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on JPM (JPMorgan Chase) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Andreas Halvorsen: TRIMMED JPM (-62%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Andreas Halvorsen (Viking Global Investors) trimmed JPM in Q4 2025 · 1.6% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Andreas Halvorsen)

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: TRIMMED JPM (-18%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) trimmed JPM in Q4 2025 · 0.2% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED JPM (+30%) · Q3 2025
